prestazioni: Engine: Full built **Lambda II 3.3L V6 (GDI + Twin Turbo - Engine Code: G6DH)** with forged internals including **Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)**, **Brian Crower H-beam connecting rods**, and **ACL Race Series bearings**. Upgraded **K1 Technologies crankshaft** with **ATI Super Damper** for high-RPM stability. Ported and polished cylinder heads with **Ferrea Competition Series valves** and **Supertech valve springs/retainers** for 8,000 RPM redline capability.

Forced Induction: **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbos (64mm, 76mm compressor wheels)** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegates** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV**. Custom **PTP Fabrication 4-inch stainless steel turbo manifolds** with **V-band flanges** and **thermal ceramic coating**. Supporting mods include **PTP 4-inch downpipe with GESI catted section**, **AEM 400 LPH fuel pumps (dual setup)**, and **ID1700x injectors** with **Radium Engineering fuel rail upgrade**.

Drivetrain & Suspension: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (85% lockup)** with **PPG 80W-140 gear oil** in a **PPG 4.88:1 final drive ratio** transmission. **Spec Stage 4+ clutch** with **South Bend billet flywheel** for aggressive engagement. **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for drift)** with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** and **SPL Parts rear camber arms**. **Hardrace front adjustable toe arms** and **Cusco rear subframe collars** for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Aero: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser)** with **custom 3D-printed canards** for aggressive downforce. **Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, with integrated NACA ducts)** and **custom carbon fiber trunk spoiler (30mm overhang)**. **Vorshlag Motorsports front splitter (3-piece, adjustable)** with **aluminum support rods**.

Exterior: **Full custom livery by Fatlace Designs (matt black base with neon green/red accents, inspired by 90s JGTC)**. **Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +15 (front) and 19x11 +30 (rear) wheels** with **Federal 595 RS-RR tires (275/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear)**. **Custom rear fender flares (hand-rolled steel, 2-inch overhang)** and **shaved door handles with remote keyless entry**.

Interior: **Recaro SPG XL seats (custom embroidered 'Stinger GT Drift' in green thread)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. **Custom roll cage by The Drift Company (8-point, chromoly steel, with gusseted main hoop)**. **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub** with **Momo Drift steering wheel (suede, 350mm)**. **Defi BF Advance gauges (oil pressure, boost, AFR, water temp) mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod** by **Jegs**.
